title: TrustVelocityMOTD
description: A lightweight, customizable MOTD plugin for Velocity (1.21 - 1.21.8).
body:
A lightweight, customizable MOTD plugin for Velocity (1.21 – 1.21.8).

TrustVelocityMOTD makes your server stand out with a fully customizable, modern MOTD system that’s easy to configure and setup.

![motd examples](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/087e17fb81f28196eff5b38e41503459b710b282.png)

**Features:**
- Supports MiniMessage, RGB, HEX, RAINBOW, and standard Minecraft & color codes
- Multi-line MOTDs with cycling rotation (optional, with custom interval)
- Hover messages when hovering over the server player list — fully color supported
- Simple and clean config.yml
- Built for Latest Velocity & optimized for performance
**Permissions:**
**trustvelocitymotd.reload**
**Commands (commands work in-game or console):**
- /trustvelocitymotd reload
- /tvm reload
**Support:**
If you are having issues or have any suggestions or need any sort of help please make sure to join the discord and make a ticket!

**Discord:** discord.gg/EvCnXvG4Jj
